prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to an application for an environmental permit issued by the Environment Agency, which is responsible for environmental regulation in England. The reference to the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations indicates its application in England.
